facts.claim: Several ships of the Holland America Line have operated under the name Noordam :SS Noordam (1902) was the first Noordam, a transatlantic ocean liner of 12,528 gross tons built at Harland and Wolff, operating mostly from Rotterdam to New York between 1902 and 1927.
MV Noordam (1938) was a 10,704 GRT cargo liner built by P.
The third Noordam was a cruise ship launched in 1983.
